title: equisetum fluviatile f. linnaeanum
intro: Equisetum fluviatile f. linnaeanum, also known as river horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the class Equisetopsida. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum fluviatile f. linnaeanum include reducing urinary tract infections, alleviating kidney stones, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically for wound healing and skin issues.
